about.en: Sui is a high-performance Layer 1 built around the Move language. SUI is used for fees, staking, and governance.
about.es: Sui es una capa 1 (Layer 1) de alto rendimiento basada en el lenguaje Move. SUI se usa para comisiones, staking (staking) y gobernanza (governance).
about.ca: Sui és una capa 1 (Layer 1) d'alt rendiment basada en el llenguatge Move. SUI s'utilitza per a comissions, staking (staking) i governança (governance).
